test-code.description: if/else returning true/false with braces - violation
if/else returning false/true with braces - violation
if/else returning true/false without braces - violation
if/else returning a non-boolean value - no violation
if/else branch with multiple statements - no violation
if/else returning computed boolean - no violation
expression body function returning true/false - violation
test-code.code: fun isEqual(bar: Int, x: Int): Boolean = if (bar == x) true else false

test-code.description: expression body function returning false/true - violation
test-code.code: fun isNotEqual(bar: Int, x: Int): Boolean = if (bar == x) false else true

test-code.description: if-as-expression assigned to local variable - violation
expression body where one branch is non-literal - no violation
test-code.code: fun check(bar: Int, x: Int): Boolean = if (bar == x) bar > 0 else false

test-code.description: expression body with non-boolean expression - no violation
test-code.code: fun describe(bar: Int, x: Int): String = if (bar == x) "equal" else "not equal"

test-code.description: when expression returning true/false in expression body - violation
test-code.code: fun isEqual(bar: Int, x: Int): Boolean = when { bar == x -> true; else -> false }
fun isNotEqual(bar: Int, x: Int): Boolean = when { bar == x -> false; else -> true }

test-code.description: when expression assigned to val - violation
when with more than two entries - no violation
when returning non-boolean literals - no violation
when on enum subject with multiple comma-separated cases grouping to true - no violation (false positive: cannot be simplified to a plain boolean expression)
test-code.code:
enum class Category { Alpha, Beta, Gamma, Delta, Epsilon, Zeta, Eta, Theta, Iota, Kappa }
val Category.isGroup1: Boolean get() = when (this) { Category.Alpha, Category.Beta, Category.Gamma, Category.Delta, Category.Epsilon, Category.Zeta, Category.Eta, Category.Theta, -> true else -> false }
